name: POE Automation script
body:
[{"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "POE Automation script"}], "data-id": "poe-automation-script"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This Script is designed to be run inside the Purchase Order Error Manager (POE) to remove all error entries without you having to do it manually!"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/5056731489039/mceclip0.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/5056731489039/mceclip0.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip0.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Scripts contain 3 different entries (you may pick whichever script to run):"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Write-Off"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Re-Order"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Back-Order"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The script is to be run in a "}, {"text": "NEW", "bold": true}, {"text": " Browser window of either Chrome or Firefox (Chrome preferred)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Script does not require a virtual machine or your attendance, you may continue to work in another Browser window/tab whilst the script runs."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Video Overview"}], "data-id": "video-overview"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "iframe", "url": "https://player.vimeo.com/video/725198385?h=62be5348b3&title=0&byline=0&portrait=0&speed=0&badge=0&autopause=0&player_id=0&app_id=58479/embed", "frameAttributes": {"width": "640", "height": "360"}, "embedData": {"url": "https://player.vimeo.com/video/725198385?h=62be5348b3&title=0&byline=0&portrait=0&speed=0&badge=0&autopause=0&player_id=0&app_id=58479/embed", "embedType": "iframe", "name": "", "width": "640", "height": "360"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "File Download"}], "data-id": "file-download"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "http://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.retailexpressmedia.com%2Fdownloads%2FPOEmanagerJSONfiles.zip", "children": [{"text": "Click here to download POE Automation Script Files"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Installation"}], "data-id": "installation"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Before beginning, you will be required to install an open-source Browser Extension from"}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fui.vision%2F", "children": [{"text": "UI Vision"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "From there once the installation is complete, you may import the Scripts into the extension and continue to the Database with the error entries to remove."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Running the Script"}], "data-id": "running-the-script"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Download "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fui.vision%2F", "children": [{"text": "Ui Vision"}]}, {"text": " -"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Download the Zip file (End of Article) containing 3 JSON files, carefully named:"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "- POE backorder"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "- POE reorder"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "- POE writeoff"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Import each file individually using the import-file/zip (repeat import for each POE script)"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/5056807326223/mceclip1.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/5056807326223/mceclip1.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip1.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open a NEW Browser window"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Log into the Database"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open UI Vision in your Extension list"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/5056810467727/mceclip2.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/5056810467727/mceclip2.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip2.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Go to the POE in the Database"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select your preferred script entry"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Backorder", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Writeoff", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Reorder", "bold": true}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Play the Script in a loop with UI Vision"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/5056870013583/mceclip4.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/5056870013583/mceclip4.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip4.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/5056877027471/mceclip6.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/5056877027471/mceclip6.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip6.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can run the Loop over the number of error entries, once the script cannot locate the Pencil button, it will error and stop."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Frequently Asked Questions"}], "data-id": "frequently-asked-questions"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#fails-to-run", "children": [{"text": "If the script fails to run"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If the script fails to run, please kindly follow the steps below to refresh the web page/script:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Log out of the Database"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Close the Browser Window"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Close the Extension"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open a NEW Browser Window"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Try again to run the script"}]}]}]}]
